Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND (bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/d210b9e528b3d7396bacee09d84465d1ede527a3912439c0c7da2c48ccfa5c40/d8355f64-f655-4ad4-abf6-21baa93e7d04/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
